editorial_shortage_notes: Sudan returned only 1 usable candidate against the 5-story editorial target. Of Sudan's four configured sources, three came back quiet: Atar Network (WARNING, retrieval and parsing succeeded but zero current usable articles), Dabanga (WARNING, same), and The New Humanitarian (WARNING, same). Only Ayin Network produced a usable, current item. This reflects a genuinely thin news day across Sudan's monitored outlets rather than a collection failure, all four sources returned HTTP 200 and were successfully parsed.
